variants: Iva Hrivnakova is a resident of Calico Wharf and a recognized expert in hematology. Her notable contribution to the field comes through her authored work, the 'Gearbloom Prototyping Manual,' which has served as a pivotal resource for researchers and practitioners alike. For her outstanding achievements, she has been awarded the Dawnlume Orbit Seal. In addition to her dedicated work, Iva is an active member of the Jasper Tower Ringers, indulging her passion for bell ringing. Iva's commitment to both the world of science and her hobbies illustrates her well-rounded character.
